original_image_tags: A torn, yellowed, aged paper clipping with typed text. There are visible stains, tape marks at the top, and some text is partially obscured or torn at the edges. Handwritten notes in ink and pencil are visible at the bottom.
At the bottom, there are handwritten notations, stamps, and file numbers.

elements.description: A single page containing a typed memo labeled 'MISC.' with multiple paragraphs of text regarding a reported sighting by Horace P. Wenyon. The bottom of the page features several rubber stamps (including one dated NOV 18 1964) and handwritten annotations, but no photographs, sketches, diagrams, or charts are present.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree there are no photographs, sketches, or diagrams, and both mention only stamps and handwritten annotations, with no conflicting claims about visual content.
